response.step_by_step_log: 1. Scanned the entire duration of the video for vocal music. 2. Audited audio tracks: 00:00-04:43 contains instrumental background music; 04:43-05:04 contains voice dialogue only. 3. Confirmed no vocal songs are present in the video.
response.global_summary: A video consisting of a slideshow displaying concert merchandise and fan messages, followed by a short segment featuring two characters talking. The background audio throughout the video is strictly instrumental, and no vocal music or singing is present.

scenes.description: A static slideshow displaying concert merchandise for the 'hololive English 4th Concert: Serendipity' and various fan messages. The background audio is instrumental.
Two characters appear and talk to the viewers. Background music fades out. No singing occurs.
